title: Pandas DataFrames
content_md:
# Pandas DataFrames

Pandas handles tabular data using DataFrames.

```python
import pandas as pd

data = {'name': ['Ana', 'Luis'], 'age': [25, 31]}
df = pd.DataFrame(data)
```

DataFrames are the backbone of all preprocessing and ML datasets.

questions.question: Write code to create a DataFrame from a dictionary.
